Return to Zero.short: Move playhead to the beginning of the project

Goto End.short: Move playhead to the end of the project

Set Left Locator.short: Set the left locator (loop start) to the current playhead position

Set Right Locator.short: Set the right locator (loop end) to the current playhead position

Locators to Selection.short: Set locators to match the current selection range

Locate Selection.short: Move playhead to the start of the current selection

Locate Selection End.short: Move playhead to the end of the current selection

Play from Selection Start.short: Start playback from the beginning of the selection

Select All.short: Select all items in the project

Start Left.short: Nudge selection start position to the left

Start Right.short: Nudge selection start position to the right

End Left.short: Nudge selection end position to the left

End Right.short: Nudge selection end position to the right

Crossfade.short: Create crossfades between overlapping audio events
